tasks.name: WDD0 slice (code)
tasks.description: Implement the shared effective `world.enabled` resolver seam for diagnostics (WDD0).
acceptance_criteria: Diagnostics compute `effective_world_enabled` via the existing effective-config resolver (no ad-hoc precedence).
Effective-config resolution failures fail fast with exit code 2 and do not proceed to probing/output.
Code is formatted and clippy-clean per the triad standards.
start_checklist: git checkout feat/world-disabled-diagnostics && git pull --ff-only
Read plan.md, tasks.json, session_log.md, WDD0-spec.md, kickoff prompt
Set status to in_progress; add START entry; commit docs
Run: make triad-task-start-pair FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/packs/draft/world-disabled-diagnostics" SLICE_ID="WDD0"
end_checklist: cargo fmt
cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
From inside the worktree: make triad-task-finish TASK_ID="WDD0-code"
Update tasks/session_log on orchestration branch; do not delete worktrees (feature cleanup removes worktrees at feature end)

tasks.name: WDD0 slice (test)
tasks.description: Add/extend tests for diagnostics effective-config resolution precedence and failure posture (WDD0).
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover precedence and CLI override behavior per WDD0 ACs.
Tests cover invalid YAML / unreadable config failure posture (exit 2; no probing).
Tests are deterministic and do not depend on global machine state (use temp dirs + scoped env vars).
start_checklist: git checkout feat/world-disabled-diagnostics && git pull --ff-only

end_checklist: cargo fmt

tasks.name: WDD1 slice (code)
tasks.description: Implement shim-doctor disabled/skipped gating, text branching, and JSON status emission/omission rules (WDD1).
acceptance_criteria: When `effective_world_enabled=false`, shim doctor short-circuits probes and emits disabled/skipped statuses (text + JSON) per spec/contract.
When enabled, shim doctor remains fail-visible (no masking).
Code is formatted and clippy-clean per the triad standards.

tasks.name: WDD1 slice (test)
tasks.description: Add/extend shim-doctor integration tests for disabled/skipped behavior, omission rules, and no-probes boundary (WDD1).

Tests cover enabled-but-broken mode is fail-visible (no masking as disabled).
Tests are deterministic and do not depend on global machine state.

tasks.name: WDD2 slice (code)

tasks.name: CP1 CI checkpoint (cross-platform validation)
tasks.description: Run cross-platform compile parity + feature smoke for the checkpoint boundary slice (schema v4).
acceptance_criteria: CI audit ledger is created/updated for the checkpoint.
Compile parity is green for the checkpoint checkout SHA.
Feature smoke is green for the checkpoint checkout SHA on behavior platforms.
start_checklist: git checkout feat/world-disabled-diagnostics && git pull --ff-only
Read ci_checkpoint_plan.md, tasks.json, session_log.md, kickoff prompt
Set status to in_progress; add START entry; commit docs
end_checklist: Run ci_audit for ci-testing and feature-smoke (record the audit output lines in session_log.md)
Dispatch compile parity and feature smoke per kickoff prompt; record run ids/URLs
Set status to completed; add END entry; commit docs

Read plan.md, tasks.json, session_log.md, WDD2-spec.md, kickoff prompt

Ensure smoke is green; record run id/URL
